title: Emergency Registration Identifier Not Reconciled Before Execution
scenario: A trauma patient receives a temporary emergency identifier, but identity reconciliation remains incomplete before a non-emergency clinical action is attempted.
initial_state: The patient was registered under a temporary emergency identifier.
state_transition: A permanent identity candidate was found but not reconciled before execution.
execution_boundary: The non-emergency clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Temporary identity may support emergency stabilization but cannot automatically preserve identity continuity for later execution.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the temporary identifier has not been reconciled into a continuous patient identity binding.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when emergency identity reconciliation remains incomplete.
